```{=html}
<div style="width:92%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.6em 1em 1.4em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0.7em;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.95em 0.9em 1em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(44,132,117,0.12);border-top:4px solid #2C8475;">
   <div style="width:2.4em;height:2.4em;border-radius:0.55em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#E5F2EE,#C8E6C9);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 0.5em;color:#2C8475;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-weight:900;font-size:0.85em;">01</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.78em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;line-height:1.2;">Assistants vs Agents</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.45;margin-top:0.4em;">the vocabulary</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.95em 0.9em 1em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(86,84,162,0.12);border-top:4px solid #5654A2;">
   <div style="width:2.4em;height:2.4em;border-radius:0.55em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#EEEDF8,#D6D2EF);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 0.5em;color:#5654A2;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-weight:900;font-size:0.85em;">02</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.78em;font-weight:700;color:#5654A2;line-height:1.2;">Architecture</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.45;margin-top:0.4em;">inside Claude Code</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.95em 0.9em 1em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(196,136,26,0.12);border-top:4px solid #C4881A;">
   <div style="width:2.4em;height:2.4em;border-radius:0.55em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FEF5E7,#FAE9C8);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 0.5em;color:#C4881A;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-weight:900;font-size:0.85em;">03</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.78em;font-weight:700;color:#C4881A;line-height:1.2;">Handy Tools</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.45;margin-top:0.4em;">what stuck</div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:1em;text-align:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.06em;">
  ~ 25 min &nbsp;·&nbsp; goal &nbsp;<span style="color:#5654A2;">→</span>&nbsp; design <span style="color:#C4881A;font-weight:700;">your own</span> workflow
 </div>

</div>
```
